name: How do I know if AI visibility optimization is actually working?

mainEntity.name: How do I know if AI visibility optimization is actually working?

acceptedAnswer.text: The best proof is a baseline audit showing where your brand appears in AI answers today, plus a follow-up after optimization. Track brand mentions, citation accuracy, competitor presence, and whether your target questions trigger answers that include your site.
acceptedAnswer.description: Measure before-and-after visibility in AI answers, not just traditional rankings.

description: Measure before-and-after visibility in AI answers, not just traditional rankings.
